chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. App. No. S – 123 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 18.03.2024 Mr. Gulshan Ahmed Shujrah, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Jamshed Ahmed Faiz, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Israr Ahmed Shah, Advocate for respondents No.1, 3 & 4. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General along with Hafiz Abdul Qadir, DSP/SDPO Rohri..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- DSP, in compliance of order dated 19.02.2024, has filed the reinvestigation report and has recommended submission of the Challan only against respondent No.1, and has exonerated the remaining private respondents. He has handed over the papers to SHO, Police Station “A” Section, Sukkur with the directions to submit the Final Challan U/S 173/512 CrPC. The SHO is directed to act in the light of the report of the DSP, who has conducted the reinvestigation under the orders of this Court. This application, in the terms as above, with consent of the parties, is accordingly disposed of with the impugned order set aside. J U D G E Abdul Basit
